title: Flourmills of Nigeria Declares N7.38 Billion Dividend Payout - FinancialEDGE
description: The Directors of Flourmills of Nigeria have recommended a total dividend of N7.38 billion, translating to N1.80* per share, subject to shareholders' approval and applicable withholding tax.
html: The Directors of Flourmills of Nigeria have recommended a total dividend of N7.38 billion, translating to N1.80* per share, subject to shareholders’ approval and applicable withholding tax.
